name: @lander-parren/blueconic-react-native-types
description: Unofficial TypeScript definitions for @blueconic/blueconic-react-native. Not affiliated with or endorsed by BlueConic.
author: Lander Parren

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish --access public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish --access public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish --access public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:upstream: node scripts/sync-upstream.mjs --write --bump && pnpm test && npm publish --access public
